deploy.startCommand: npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260223141837_init_pgvector 2>/dev/null; echo "DELETE FROM _prisma_migrations WHERE migration_name = '20260303022200_add_followup_and_retention_fields' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'Conversation' AND column_name = 'followUpCount');" | npx prisma db execute --stdin 2>/dev/null || true; npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run start:prod
